title: Judge Vista 6-Piece Set of Stainless Steel Pans, 16cm, 18cm & 20cm Draining Saucepans with Lids, 14cm Milk Pan, 24cm Casserole, 26cm Non-Stick Frying Pan
features: HIGH-SIDED PANS WITH LIDS - designed in Bristol, England, this pan set includes 16cm, 18cm and 20cm saucepans, a 14cm milk pan, 24cm casserole pan and 26cm non-stick frying pan - saucepans feature handy measuring guides on the inside that save you time
DRAIN WITHOUT NEEDING A COLANDER - lid has built-in double-sided strainer, in two different sizes, so you don't need a separate colander to drain away excess water
TOUGHENED GLASS LID - shatterproof glass with a reinforced rim has vents to release steam and help prevent boiling over and the clear glass lets you see what's cooking
INDUCTION-READY AND DISHWASHER SAFE - thick 'hot-forged' base ensures fast, even heat distribution on all kinds of stovetop including gas, halogen, ceramic, solid plate, induction or an aga

25 YEAR GUARANTEE and 10 YEAR NON-STICK WARRANTY by Judge Homewares. Judge has been trusted by families all over the world for more than a hundred years for its traditional family values, high performance products and award-winning customer service
description: From the manufacturer ABOUT JUDGE VISTA DRAINING Judge pans have been a favourite in homes for more than a century and are known all over the world for their high quality and impressive performance. Vista Draining pans offer a contemporary convenience with lids that let out steam and strain vegetables. Judge Vista Draining Pans have a heavy-duty non-stick coating and are specially shaped with large lips for pouring and an integral strainer in the lid. KEY FEATURES: Double-sided draining lids Internal time-saving measuring guides Secure easy grip, comfortable, phenolic low-heat transmission handles Shatterproof glass lids Suitable for Gas, Halogen, Ceramic, & Solid Plate Induction suitable Excalibur non-stick coating (frying pan) Oven safe up to 180°C Dishwasher safe PEACE OF MIND Judge is a long-established brand used by thousands of families all over the world for more than a hundred years. It is known for its traditional family values and top attention to customers. LIQUID MARKINGS Easily see how much water is in the pan - no need to measure EASY TO DRAIN Water flows out of the large lip strained by holes in the lid IMPRESSIVE PERFORMANCE Designed to give outstanding cooking results on all types of hob for years to come Judge Vista, 6 Piece Draining Saucepan Set Judge JJC2A Vista 5 Piece Saucepan Set, Stainless Steel Judge JJH1A Vista 6 Piece Saucepan Set, Stainless Steel Judge Vista J3C1A Set of 5 Stainless Steel Draining Pans in Gift Box Judge Vista, 3 Piece Draining Saucepan Set Judge Vista, 5 Piece Draining Saucepan Set Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 377 4.2 out of 5 stars 61 4.4 out of 5 stars 55 4.5 out of 5 stars 377 4.5 out of 5 stars 377 4.5 out of 5 stars 377 Price £85.60 £ 85 . 60 — no data £137.20 £ 137 . 20 — no data — no data — no data Induction Suitable ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Dishwasher Safe ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Oven Safe ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
